nasb.text: his corpse shall not hang all night on the tree, but you shall surely bury him on the same day (for he who is hanged is accursed of God), so that you do not defile your land which the Lord your God gives you as an inheritance.

esv.text: his body shall not remain all night on the tree, but you shall bury him the same day, for a hanged man is cursed by God. You shall not defile your land that the Lord your God is giving you for an inheritance.

cnv.text: 他的屍體不可留在樹上過夜，必須在當日把他埋葬，因為被掛在木頭上的，是受　神咒詛的；這樣，你就不至於玷污耶和華你的　神賜給你作產業的地了。”

ccb.text: 不可让尸体在木头上过夜，必须当天埋葬，因为凡挂在木头上的人都是上帝所咒诅的。你们不可玷污你们的上帝耶和华将要赐给你们的土地。
